_comment: Scene template for Ashen campaign reuse. Coordinates in pixels (5 ft/grid = 100 px).
name: X · Scene Name — Subtitle
brief: Tactical brief: layout, NPCs, hazards, teaching moment.

walls._comment: Perimeter walls [x1, y1, x2, y2]. move=1 blocks movement, sight=1 blocks vision.

lights._comment: Ambient light: x, y, dim radius px, bright radius px, angle degrees, color hex, animation type.
